signals.headline: NFT Marketplace Foundation Shuts Down | CONFIRMED | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
NFT Marketplace Foundation Shuts Down | CONFIRMED | HIGH confidence**

A major Ethereum art platform closed after a failed acquisition on April 17[4], highlighting sector consolidation but having limited impact on broader ETH price movements.

The primary market-moving factor is the **imminent Iran nuclear deal**, which has injected broad risk-on sentiment into cryptocurrency markets[4].

signals.headline: US-Iran Uranium Deal Nears Completion | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US-Iran Uranium Deal Nears Completion | YES | HIGH confidence**
